title: Fix build path wrong https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7993
body:
Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7993
```
mkdir -p /tmp/buildTest
cd /tmp/buildTest
podman build -t testName .
```
will got this error
```
Error: error reading info about "/tmp/buildTest/tmp/buildTest/Dockerfile": stat /tmp/buildTest/tmp/buildTest/Dockerfile: no such file or directory
```


Signed-off-by: zhangguanzhang <zhangguanzhang@qq.com>

comments.body:
LGTM
had to run this down a bit more than intended, we get a different error entirely from `buildah bud` and just wanted to make sure this addresses this.
Also, FWIW, this won't fix the Podman issue until Buildah is vendored into Podman again.
